Aanya's Quickening  

Description

1: Increase Attack Speed by 64%

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 275 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 4 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 125
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Short Buff Box: No
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You experience a quickening.
Cast on other: Soandso experiences a quickening.
Effect Fades: Your speed returns to normal.

Game Description

Grants your target quickened movement, increasing their attack speed for 24.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Aanya's Quickening

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Aanya's Quickening
ClassLevel
ENC53
Expansion:

Duration:
24.0 mins
  • Comments (10)
  • Sold By (5)
  • NPCs with Ability (10)
  • Screenshots
Post Comment
also stacks with........
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2007 at 9:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592764751729
10 posts
This spell also stacks with Speed of Vallon, though I don't see the point since Vallon is a 68% haste with increase to str, dex, agi, and atk.
▲ Page top
Found it
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2006 at 8:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591903581829
1 post
I found this spell on Phoenth Ingven in Abysmal Sea. 16p 7g 9s 9c for a chanter with 120 cha.
▲ Page top
Minimum level of target
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2006 at 6:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591791481867
View User Forum
33 posts
Apparent, the target must be of a minimum level. Spell would not stick to my 38th level Beastlord. We'll conduct more research to find the actual minimum.
▲ Page top
RE: Minimum level of target
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2006 at 11:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772206563
39 posts
Any spell, 51 to 60 will not stick on a character lower than level 45...spells 61-65 require level 46 to take effect, and 66-70 reqiure level 61 to stick. Been that way for a couple years now. (since they fixed the bug that allowed Virtue and KEI to stick on any level toon who was in the group when cast)
▲ Page top
That's it?
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 10:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
This spell only gives a 4% increase in haste over the SLTW spell 4 levels ago? Not a very big difference.
▲ Page top
RE: That's it?
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2003 at 4:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591758892776
View User Forum
123 posts
Not only is it longer duration and a little more haste, but the cast time is HALFED. I personally hated standing for a good 30-40 seconds hasting everyone.
▲ Page top
RE: That's it?
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2004 at 11:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591796514348
57 posts
Exactly, I went out of my way to get an EE4 item just so my hastes would last longer, not so my KEI would, longer recast on haste time, mor emana regened inbetween casts..... This spell is MUCH better
▲ Page top
RE: That's it?
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2003 at 2:50 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767530379
View User Forum
Scholar
301 posts
Try 4% speed increase but 50% longer duration.

SLTW lasts 16 minutes. This one lasts 24 minutes.

Cost for a 50% duration increase and 4% more haste: 25 mana.

Hmmm.... Each to their own but I love this spell and use it all the time. Now our next step up in this line of spells... That one I am dubious about. 6% more haste than this but lasts a shorter duration, takes longer to cast and costs 50 more mana to use.
▲ Page top
buy spell
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2003 at 7:32 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784957095
3 posts
As far as I know you'll get it in OT from your spellvendor there, alternatively, if you're a good race, go to FV and buy it there.
▲ Page top
